title: HibiscusMC Plus
description: A modpack to improve the experience for users on HibiscusMC: Awakened, a vanilla Minecraft Server.
body: **HibiscusMC Plus** is an optional, lightweight modpack curated to **enhance your experience on HibiscusMC: Awakened**. While not required to play, it adds small quality-of-life improvements, and performance optimizations that make your time on the server smoother. All of the resources in this modpack are curated and approved by the HibiscusMC Staff & Team. HibiscusMC Plus is currently available for 1.21.8, which is the recommended version to play HibiscusMC on. ## What It Adds - **Discord Rich Presence** — Show off your activity on HibiscusMC directly on Discord - **Iris + Sodium pre-installed** — Shader Support - **Performance-focused optimizations** — Faster loading times and more stable gameplay - **Shulker Tooltips** — Instantly preview shulker contents - **Dynamic Lighting** — Hold light sources and see the world glow around you - **Fullbright option** — Gives you a permanent night-vision like effect.
